about.title: What is Kids Entrepreneurs Fair?
about.description: Kids Entrepreneurs Fair is a children's entrepreneurship fair that arrives at premium shopping malls around the world. A 3-day event where kids are the protagonists: they run their own business, present their brand on stage, and live a unique experience with robots, artificial intelligence, and drones.
about.description2: This is not a recreational activity. It is a real commercial and educational space where every child receives a personalized credential with a QR code.

experiences.title: Two experiences, one fair
experiences.subtitle: There are two ways to experience Kids Entrepreneurs Fair:

exhibitor.title: The Exhibitor Entrepreneur
exhibitor.description: Does your child have a business? This is their stage. Kids Entrepreneurs Fair opens a call where the public chooses the best children's businesses per city through Instagram. Selected families participate completely free with their own booth, credentials, official certificate, and much more.
exhibitor.cta: Learn about the open call and submit your child

visitor.title: The Future Entrepreneur
visitor.description: Does your child want to discover the world of entrepreneurship, technology, and innovation? Visit Kids Entrepreneurs Fair. Register your family and live a unique experience. Admission is free.
benefits: Free access to all exhibitor booths
Access to the Interactive Experience Zone: robots, AI, and drones
Live shows and entertainment on stage
Personalized credential with their name and QR
Future Entrepreneur Certificate upon completing the experience

zones.title: 4 zones, one complete experience
zones.subtitle: The fair is designed as a connected journey inside the shopping mall. From the moment you arrive, each zone leads you to the next.

items.name: Registration Point
items.location: At the entrance — your first impression
items.description: You arrive with your family, register in seconds, and your child receives their personalized credential with their name and QR code. From that moment, they are part of Kids Entrepreneurs Fair.
details: Immediate delivery of credential with name + QR

items.name: The Stage
items.location: At the front, visible from the shopping mall corridors
items.description: The stage is the heart of the event. It's the first thing you see and hear. It attracts the shopping mall audience and gives visibility to the young entrepreneurs.
details: Entrepreneur pitches: each exhibitor child goes on stage with their family to present their business (3-5 minutes)
Shows and entertainment: dance, live robotics demos, and music between pitches
Special moments: opening ceremony, certificate ceremony, group photo, and closing

items.name: Young Entrepreneurs Booths
items.location: In the center, forming aisles — the kids' marketplace
items.description: Booths per city where kids with golden credentials run their own business. Each booth has a professional sign with the business name.
details: Categories: crafts, technology, toys, books, art, fashion, eco-friendly products
Important: Food and beverages are not allowed per shopping mall policy

items.name: Interactive Experience Zone
items.location: At the back, semi-enclosed to feel special
items.description: This is the wow zone. Here kids touch, create, and experiment with real technology. Three stations they will never forget:
details: Build Your Robot — The child builds and programs their own robot with educational robotics kits
Talk to the AI — The child creates their business idea with artificial intelligence and takes home a printed mini business plan
Fly the Future — Live demos of drones and humanoid robots. The future right before your eyes

call.title: Open call: does your child have a business? Submit it!
call.description: Kids Entrepreneurs Fair is looking for the best children's businesses per city. How are they selected? The public decides. As a parent or guardian, register your child, record a video presenting their business, and post it on Instagram in collaboration with @kidsentrepreneursfair. The videos with the most likes, comments, and shares in each city win their spot at the fair. Participation is completely free.
call.benefits_title: What does your family receive if selected?
benefits: Own booth for the full 3 days of the fair (free of charge)
Professional sign with the business name
Golden credentials with QR for the child and their family
Product sales — 100% of sales go to the family
Pitch on the main stage in front of the audience
Official Exhibitor Entrepreneur Certificate from Global Entrepreneurship Hub UAE, delivered in a ceremony
Feature on the company's social media
Membership in the Kids Entrepreneurs Fair community for the whole family
Public recognition and first real sales
how_steps: Register your child and their business in the corresponding city
Record a video (max 2 min) presenting the business and post it on Instagram in collaboration with @kidsentrepreneursfair
Share with family, friends and community — likes, comments and shares count
Videos with the best metrics per city win their spot with booth, credentials and everything included

certificates.title: Official certificates
certificates.subtitle: Every child who participates in Kids Entrepreneurs Fair receives an official certificate backed by Global Entrepreneurship Hub UAE.

exhibitor.title: Exhibitor Entrepreneur Certificate
exhibitor.description: Official recognition for children who participate with their business at the fair. Delivered on stage in a special ceremony.

visitor.title: Future Entrepreneur Certificate
visitor.description: Official recognition for children who visit the fair and complete the experience. Delivered at the end of the tour.

sell.title: What can I sell at my booth?
sell.note: IMPORTANT: Food and beverages are not allowed per shopping mall policy.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.exhibitor_title: If you want to be an Exhibitor:

exhibitor_steps.title: Register your child and their business
exhibitor_steps.desc: As a parent or guardian, complete the form with your details, your child's details, and the business information.

exhibitor_steps.title: Upload the video on Instagram
exhibitor_steps.desc: Record a video (max 2 minutes) where your child presents their business and post it from your account in collaboration with @kidsentrepreneursfair.

exhibitor_steps.title: Promote and share
exhibitor_steps.desc: Ask your family, friends, and community to like, comment, and share. The metrics decide.

exhibitor_steps.title: The best ones get in
exhibitor_steps.desc: When the contest closes, the videos with the best metrics per city win their spot with booth, credentials, certificate, and everything included.

howItWorks.visitor_title: If you want to be a Visitor:

visitor_steps.title: Register your family
visitor_steps.desc: As a parent or guardian, complete the free pre-registration with your details and your child's details.

visitor_steps.title: Arrive at the fair
visitor_steps.desc: At the entrance your child receives their personalized credential with QR.

visitor_steps.title: Explore and enjoy
visitor_steps.desc: Visit the booths, watch the pitches on stage, and experience the Interactive Experience Zone.

visitor_steps.title: Your child takes their certificate
visitor_steps.desc: Upon completing the experience, they receive their Future Entrepreneur Certificate.

items.q: Does admission to the fair have a cost?
items.a: No. Admission for visitors is completely free.

items.q: Does it cost to participate as an exhibitor?
items.a: No. Selected families participate completely free.
Through an Instagram contest. Each family posts their child's video in collaboration with @kidsentrepreneursfair and the videos with the best metrics per city win their spot.
Max 2 minutes. Your child presents their business: what it is, why they created it, and what they sell. It can be recorded with a phone, no professional editing needed.

items.q: How do I post the video in collaboration?
items.a: From your personal Instagram account, creating a post in collaboration with @kidsentrepreneursfair. Upon registration, you'll receive step-by-step instructions.

items.q: Does my child receive anything as a visitor?
items.a: Yes. A credential with QR upon registration and a Future Entrepreneur Certificate upon completing the experience.

items.q: What is the Interactive Experience Zone?
items.a: A space with three stations: build your robot with educational robotics kits, create your business idea with artificial intelligence, and watch drone and humanoid robot demos.

items.q: Can I sell food or drinks?
I don't have a logo, is that a problem?
items.a: No. We design the sign with the business name in a professional format.

items.q: My child is under 5, can they participate?
items.a: Yes, with a responsible adult present at all times.

items.q: Do you charge commission on my sales?
items.a: No. 100% of sales go to your family.
Yes, with your own materials. The top sign is provided by the organization.
Yes. You can display your product on a screen or tablet.

sponsors.title: Sponsors & Partners
sponsors.subtitle: We're building the first edition. If your brand wants to be part of this story, get in touch.
sponsors.organizer_desc: Organized from the United Arab Emirates. Connecting children's entrepreneurship with the world.

register.title: Register
register.exhibitor_title: Submit your child and their business
register.exhibitor_subtitle: As a parent or legal guardian, complete the form with your details, your child's details, and their business information.
register.visitor_subtitle: Admission is free. Pre-register so that on the day of the fair, registration is instant and your child receives their credential upon arrival.
register.business_description: Business description (what they sell, since when, why they created it)
register.video_url: Link to Instagram video (in collaboration with @kidsentrepreneursfair) — required
register.siblings_details: Add name and age of each sibling
register.auth_data: I declare that I have read and accept the personal data processing policies.
register.auth_image: I authorize the use of photographs, videos, logos, and other graphic material provided in this form, as well as photographs and videos captured before and during the event, for dissemination on the website, social media, and other digital channels of Global Entrepreneurship Hub, the Kids Entrepreneurs Fair, and its official sponsors, for promotional, educational, and outreach purposes, without financial compensation. This authorization includes the use of the image of the minor and the parent or guardian.
register.submit_visitor: I want to attend for free
register.success: Registration successful! We'll contact you soon.

cta.title: Your child is already an entrepreneur.
cta.subtitle: They just need the stage. Submit them and let the public decide.
cta.note: Limited spots in Bogotá. Instagram decides.

items.a: Children and youth aged 5 to 17 with business or entrepreneurship ideas.

items.q: What do I need to apply as an exhibitor?
items.a: Complete the registration form and submit a short video on Instagram in collaboration with @kidsentrepreneursfair presenting your business.
No. Visitor registration is free. Exhibitors also participate completely free if selected.

items.q: Do parents need to accompany children?
items.a: Yes, minors must be accompanied by a responsible adult during the event.
